description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image, caches the .gradle directory with key ${CI_PROJECT_ID}, and defines a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the current .gradle folder and makes ./gradlew executable. Define a single stage called build and a build job that runs the script ./gradlew assembleDebug. The build job should publish the generated app/build/outputs/apk/app-debug.apk as an artifact. The pipeline runs on all branches without additional rules.
